topic: 在 training-free 条件下改进 Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) 的生成性能，或在维持性能的同时提升 DLMs 的推理速度。

literature_searches.query: ("predictive coding" OR "active inference") AND ("language model" OR decoding OR generation)
("kinetic proofreading" OR "error correction") AND (decoding OR generation OR "language model")
("statistical physics" OR nucleation OR "energy landscape") AND ("language model" OR sequence OR decoding)
(metacognition OR confidence OR uncertainty) AND ("dynamic computation" OR "selective prediction" OR "adaptive computation")

key_sources: Neuroscience and Biobehavioral Reviews predictive coding review page
PubMed / Cerebral Cortex predictive error evidence page
Annual Review of Biochemistry kinetic proofreading review

ranked_candidates.title: Selective Commitment Benchmark
why_now: Fits the TIGER pivot and diagnostic-first evidence.
Uses uncertainty as compute-allocation signal instead of overclaiming a new decoding heuristic.
Explains reasoning/code divergence under matched compute.
testable_predictions: Sample-level selective commitment will be more stable than complex token-level revision on reasoning tasks.
Rollback/freeze after structural alarms will outperform continued local revision on code tasks.
Calibration improvements may help selective risk-coverage even when end-task accuracy stays flat.
ranked_candidates.compute_cost: small-model pilot 1-2 GPU days; 8B follow-up 0.5-1.5 GPU days

ranked_candidates.title: Proofread-Then-Commit
why_now: Directly grounded in the observed value of rollback-to-standard on code.
Cheaper and more honest than inventing another instability signal.
testable_predictions: Will beat ungated revision on code boundary tasks.
Will not reliably beat simple entropy revision on reasoning.
ranked_candidates.compute_cost: <1 GPU day on small models; ~0.5 GPU day on 8B

ranked_candidates.title: Energy-Landscape Diagnostic
why_now: Best lens for explaining why local edits help reasoning but damage code.
Useful for theory/analysis even if not promoted to a method.
testable_predictions: Code failures will show stronger cluster-level coupling than reasoning failures.
Local token edits will correlate weakly with success unless structural nuclei are preserved.
ranked_candidates.compute_cost: mostly analysis + targeted probing, low extra cost

recommended_primary_direction.headline: Reframe the campaign as a compute-normalized selective commitment benchmark for DLMs.
next_actions: Rewrite current/idea/proposal.md away from TIGER and toward diagnostic/benchmark-first framing
Run small-model pilots on GPT-2, BERT-base corruption proxy, and Qwen-0.5B before any new 8B scale-out
